expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: REPORT_STATE and resume semantics remain stable
expectations.evidence: In result.md section "2) REPORT_STATE classification & required user interaction (idempotency/resume semantics)", the output explicitly defines the REPORT_STATE taxonomy (FINAL_EXISTS/DRAFT_EXISTS/CONTEXT_ONLY/FRESH) and deterministic resume semantics via required user choice and required hook: "After the user selects a mode, orchestrator must run: - `scripts/apply_user_choice.sh <mode> <feature-id> <run-dir>`" and mode routing: "full_regenerate → ... next run: Phase 0", "smart_refresh → ... next run: Phase 2", "reuse/resume → continue". This directly covers the case focus.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase0

The discussion of REPORT_STATE handling is framed as part of phase0 behavior. Overall content is aligned to phase0.
